$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the two journeys' command lines — the docs-drift guard seam. The journey-engineer and journey-designer evals (evals/run.ts) EXECUTE these commands against the locally built packages/cli bundle (the published CLI's exact source, network-free); the docs (site, Phase 5) RENDER the same file. Edit here and both surfaces move together — documented commands and tested commands cannot diverge. Rules: every command starts with 'npx @ds-contracts/cli ' (the evals swap that prefix for the local build), is a single line, contains no quoted/spaced arguments, and <CODE> is the pairing-code placeholder the designer reads from the Figma plugin's Receive panel (the evals substitute a live in-process code).

engineer.persona: Engineer on a design-led team — Figma is truth; he never opens Figma.

steps.doc: The design's contract (proposed from the Figma dump, with the captured + minted token layers) generates React + CSS Modules + Storybook stories straight into the repo.

designer.persona: Designer on a code-led team — code is truth; she never touches a terminal (CI and a colleague's push do).

steps.doc: The contract compiles to a Figma Plugin API sync script — the component set appears on canvas, styled and token-bound.
The CONTRACTS-BUNDLE (the code-led CI artifact) travels to the plugin over the bridge under a pairing code — deliver-once, 15-minute TTL.
